headline: EQT Corporation (EQT): Leopold Aschenbrenner Is No Longer Bullish
summary: We just covered the From Fired Researcher to $13.7 Billion King: How Leopold Aschenbrenner Broke the Hedge Fund World and EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) ranks 32nd on this list. Filings for the first quarter of 2026 show that Leopold Aschenbrenner has sold off the stake his hedge fund had in EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT). The stock first […]
